Herbal tea • Postpartum recovery • Minerals & blood

Nettle Tea

A deep-green mineral tea — iron, calcium & magnesium to rebuild you.
Makes 1 cup
Time 5–15 min
Caffeine none
For you · a daily mineral sip
When to drink Any time through the day — a mineral-rich daily sip.

Why this heals you

  • Nettle — rich in iron, calcium & magnesium verified ×2
  • Supports milk supply tradition
  • A gentle mineral rebuild after birth tradition
  • Caffeine-free tradition
Ingredients
1–2 tspDried nettle (or 1 tea bag)
1 cupJust-boiled water
optionalA squeeze of lemon (lifts the iron)
Method
1
Steep

Pour just-boiled water over the nettle; cover and steep 5–15 min (longer = more minerals).

2
Strain

Strain into your cup.

3
Sip

A squeeze of lemon lifts the iron. Sip warm through the day.

Just for you, Mum

The most mineral-dense of your teas — iron, calcium and magnesium to rebuild the reserves birth and nursing draw down.

Good to know
BestSteep longer (10–15 min) for more minerals.
WithA squeeze of lemon — vitamin C to absorb the iron.
Why we say this
Nettle’s mineral density (iron, calcium, magnesium) is corroborated by ≥2 dated sources in the Knowledge Bank; milk-support framing labelled tradition.
